name: The Synthesis Reinvocation
effect: Declare that synthesis must be reinvoked. This card is considered urgent.

clauses.name: REINVOCATION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If synthesis was previously invoked: It is considered to have lapsed and must be reinvoked immediately.

clauses.name: ALIGNMENT EFFECT
clauses.rule: When all stakeholders agree synthesis is needed: The meeting ends without defining what synthesis is.

clauses.name: ORIGINAL MANDATE OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If anyone asks what synthesis means: Reference the original mandate and schedule a follow-up.

translation_layer.observation: A word said in a meeting.
translation_layer.skeptical_question: Was synthesis ever invoked the first time?
